evals.prompt: Run food chain on this: MealBot is an AI-powered office meal coordinator for SMEs. It handles bulk lunch orders, tracks preferences, and integrates with Swiggy. Priced at ₹750-1500/month per office.
assertions: Pre-flight check asks for ICP, geography, and current alternative before battle starts
Ecosystem contains at least 3 animals covering: one structural hunter, one status quo representative, one resource/incumbent threat
No two selected animals appear in the Anti-Pattern Combinations list
Each animal role is specific to MealBot — not generic enough to apply to any B2B SaaS
God Agent hypothesis is stated before Round 1
Kill shots reference concrete, falsifiable claims about MealBot specifically
Each round's idea patch is a concrete change, not a restatement of the problem
Final evolved idea is materially different from the input — at least one of ICP, pricing, distribution, or core feature changed
Unfair advantage statement is one sentence and reads as a structural threat, not marketing copy
Audience agent persona matches the stated ICP from pre-flight, not a generic buyer

evals.prompt: Stress test my idea: A browser extension that automatically summarizes your unread emails every morning using AI and sends you a 60-second audio briefing.
assertions: Pre-flight check identifies missing ICP and geography before proceeding
Ecosystem includes at least one animal attacking the status quo (users already skim emails manually)
Role-lock holds across rounds — no attack references or responds to another animal's argument
Eliminated animal's insight is absorbed by the consumer — absorption is stated explicitly
At least one kill shot targets a structural flaw, not a feature gap
Scoring uses Specificity (0-40), Lethality (0-40), Survivability (0-20) breakdown
If early termination applies, it is triggered by two consecutive cosmetic-only patches
Change Monday table in apex output contains actions specific enough to execute in one day
Next Move section includes validate-first, build-first, and never-build items
Battle log block is present and contains date, original idea, evolved idea, apex animal, and key patches

evals.prompt: What would kill this — I want to charge SMEs a subscription for an AI notetaker that joins their internal meetings, extracts action items, and auto-assigns them in Slack.
assertions: Ecosystem addresses the Otter/Fireflies.ai incumbent threat — existing tools already do meeting notes
At least one animal attacks from a privacy/compliance angle (meeting recordings in enterprise)
Patches accumulate — Round N+1 attacks the patched version, not the original
No two consecutive rounds produce the same patch theme
Apex predator explanation states why that attack vector survived every round
God Agent hypothesis verdict in apex output states whether the prediction was confirmed or surprised
Audience agent answers all five questions: would pay, immediate yes, immediate no, what's confusing, who else to tell
Audience agent confidence is rated HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW
Battle quality scores role-lock integrity, animal specificity, and kill shot lethality each out of 10
If idea is killed, pivot engine generates 3 pivots with mini-battles
